---
title: "Quarto Extensions"
description: "Templates and filters for reproducible reports made (mostly) for Quarto"
listing:
  - id: templates
    template: webscripts/templates.ejs
    contents: webscripts/templates.yml
page-layout: full
---

A live gallery with rendered previews of all templates is available at [christophertkenny.com/template-gallery](https://christophertkenny.com/template-gallery/).

::: {#templates}
:::
